turns.text: Here's a skin lesion I found on my back. Can you describe what you see?
turns.image_description: Close-up of skin lesion with irregular border, tan-brown color, flat surface, natural skin lighting

turns.text: I observe an irregularly bordered, tan-brown flat lesion. The asymmetry and color variation are concerning. Have you noticed any changes in size or color recently?
Here's a follow-up image taken two weeks later. The lesion appears different now.
turns.image_description: Same lesion with increased pigmentation, slight elevation, surrounding redness, indirect lighting

turns.text:
What is the final classification of this skin lesion?

C) Malignant melanoma with ulceration and pronounced elevation
A) Benign lesion with irregular border
B) Actinic keratosis with inflammatory changes
D) Seborrheic keratosis with hyperpigmentation

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: Turn 1 established baseline irregularity and color. Turn 2 showed increased pigmentation, elevation, and redness indicating progression. Turn 3 revealed ulceration and darker pigmentation confirming malignant transformation.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: Progressive malignant changes require sequential tracking for accurate diagnosis
